notes: Two-leg XTI/XNG energy cross-sectional momentum basket derived from the approved SRC05_S10 Chan/Daniel-Moskowitz commodity futures momentum card. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX host setfile, reads XTIUSD.DWX and XNGUSD.DWX D1 closes, and monthly buys the stronger 6-month energy leg while shorting the weaker leg. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not standalone legs.
